questions.question: What is the primary purpose of compiling smart contract code?
keyPoints: Prepare code for deployment on the blockchain

questions.question: Describe the process of deploying a smart contract on a blockchain.
keyPoints: Deploy the bytecode on the blockchain

questions.question: What is the role of gas in smart contract deployment?
keyPoints: Determine the cost of contract execution
Measure computational effort required to execute the contract

questions.question: Compare and contrast the different blockchain platforms that support smart contract deployment.
keyPoints: Features and use cases of each platform

questions.question: What is the importance of smart contract security and testing?
Describe the role of the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) in smart contract deployment.
keyPoints: Execute smart contract code on the Ethereum blockchain
Provide a decentralized and secure environment for contract execution

questions.question: What is the difference between deploying and instantiating a smart contract?
keyPoints: Deploying involves sending the compiled bytecode to the blockchain
Instantiating involves creating an instance of the contract
